title: HP India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: HP India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
HP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
